title: Health & Glow Global Group is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Health & Glow Global Group is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, Health & Glow Global Group in Tiruchirappalli is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Health & Glow Global Group:
Health & Glow Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Health & Glow Global Group!
